title: generate/endgenerate should not be optional in Verilog 2001

features.name: genvar for loop without generate keyword
features.description: Code should include a genvar declaration with a for loop using begin/end without the generate keyword

features.name: generate block with always procedural block
features.description: Code should include a generate construct containing an always block with procedural assignment

features.name: dynamic array slice in left-hand side assignment
features.description: Code should include an array slice assignment where the slice indices are variable (genvar-controlled)
